title: Nebulus Trader for the Jungle
description: add a new trader to the jungle and more
body:
This mod adds a new trader at the jungle biome



This mod also futures:

 • Also in this mod you get tree new weapon type

 • You can buy a panda at the Jungle Trader

 • Added the bambus jar 

 • You get a new structur where the trader lives

 • Added a variation of tropical fishes
 
 • Added a variation of tropical fishes

 • Add new food item to the game




His workstation is the Block of Bamboo
